name: Port of Singapore
notes: World's second-busiest port by container volume. Critical transshipment hub for Asia-Europe and Asia-Americas routes.

name: Port of Shanghai
notes: World's busiest container port. Yangtze River delta hub, vital to Chinese export manufacturing.

name: Port of Rotterdam
notes: Europe's largest port. Gateway for European imports; major crude oil and LNG terminal.

name: Jeddah Islamic Port
notes: Primary Saudi Red Sea port. Handles 60% of Kingdom's imports. Adjacent to RSAF air base.

name: Port of Kaohsiung
notes: Taiwan's primary deep-water container port. Strategically located near Taiwan Strait chokepoint.

name: Port of Hong Kong
notes: Major transshipment hub for South China. PLA Navy has berthing rights at Stonecutters Island.

name: Port of Jebel Ali
notes: Largest port in Middle East. US Navy's largest overseas port call outside CONUS. DP World operated.

name: Port Said
notes: Northern entrance to Suez Canal. Convoy staging point for northbound and southbound transits.

name: Diego Garcia (NSF)
notes: US/UK joint naval support facility. Hosts B-52 bombers, P-8 Poseidons, pre-positioned logistics ships.

name: Naval Station Rota
notes: US Navy EUCOM forward base. Home to DDG destroyers. Key NATO Atlantic/Med hub.

name: Fleet Activities Yokosuka
notes: US 7th Fleet forward HQ. USS Ronald Reagan homeport. Critical for Taiwan Strait deterrence.

name: Bandar Abbas
notes: Iran's largest port. IRIN headquarters. Controls approaches to Strait of Hormuz.

name: Port of Djibouti
notes: Hosts US CJTF-HOA, French, Japanese, and Chinese military facilities. Red Sea/Gulf of Aden junction.

name: PLA Navy Base Djibouti
notes: China's first overseas military base. Berthing for PLAN vessels, logistics support hub.

name: Port of Colombo
notes: South Asian transshipment hub. Hambantota port leased to China (99 years). BRI strategic node.

name: Port Klang
notes: Malaysia's main port. 12th busiest globally. Sits at northern end of Malacca Strait.

name: Port of Piraeus
notes: COSCO-owned since 2016. China's primary European entry point for BRI cargo.

name: Colon Free Zone
notes: Atlantic entrance to Panama Canal. Largest free trade zone in Western Hemisphere.

name: Shuaiba Oil Terminal
notes: Kuwait's primary oil export terminal. Capacity ~1.7M bpd. Vulnerable to Hormuz closure.

name: Ras Tanura
notes: Saudi Aramco's largest oil export facility. ~7% of global oil supply transits here. Highest-value target in global energy infrastructure.
